title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an end-to-end AI video generation workflow powered by Claude that automatically handles planning, coding, voiceover, visuals, music, and editing. The system uses Archon as a workflow orchestration harness and HyperFrames as the video generation framework, enabling one-command production of polished videos from ideas or URLs without human editors, animators, or voice actors.
